changeSet.author: openelis-pathology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory' ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

changeSet.comment: Restore the missing Sample Processing and Individual Patient Report stages and reorder legacy pathology pages to the canonical 13-stage model required by workflow type routing.
changeSet.sql: UPDATE clinlims.notebook_page SET page_order = 13 WHERE notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory') AND title = 'Disposal & Archiving' AND page_order <> 13;

UPDATE clinlims.notebook_page SET page_order = 12 WHERE notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory') AND title = 'Reporting & Performance Monitoring' AND page_order <> 12;

UPDATE clinlims.notebook_page SET page_order = 11 WHERE notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory') AND title = 'Storage & Inventory Management' AND page_order <> 11;
UPDATE clinlims.notebook_page SET page_order = 9 WHERE notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory') AND title = 'Microscopy & Diagnosis' AND page_order <> 9;
UPDATE clinlims.notebook_page SET page_order = 8 WHERE notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory') AND title = 'Slide Staining' AND page_order <> 8;
UPDATE clinlims.notebook_page SET page_order = 7 WHERE notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory') AND title = 'Slide Preparation' AND page_order <> 7;
UPDATE clinlims.notebook_page SET page_order = 6 WHERE notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Pathology Laboratory') AND title = 'Block Creation' AND page_order <> 6;

INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, notebook_id, page_order, title, page_type, instructions, content, completed, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), n.id, 5, 'Sample Processing', 'INDIVIDUAL_PROCESSING', 'Process pathology samples after cassette setup. This stage supports tissue processing for biopsy workflows and fluid processing for cytology workflows, with its own QC before slide preparation.', '{ "pageDescription":"Sample Processing", "nextPage":"Block Creation" }'::jsonb, false, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 5 AND np.title = 'Sample Processing' );

INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, notebook_id, page_order, title, page_type, instructions, content, completed, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), n.id, 10, 'Individual Patient Report Preview and Print', 'AGGREGATION', 'Generate, preview, edit, and print the individual patient report after microscopy and diagnosis. This stage is distinct from the later operational reporting stage.', '{ "pageDescription":"Individual Patient Report Preview and Print", "nextPage":"Storage & Inventory Management" }'::jsonb, false, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title = 'Pathology Laboratory' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 10 AND np.title = 'Individual Patient Report Preview and Print' );
